questions.question: Describe the deadlock detection algorithm using Banker's algorithm and explain its advantages.
questions.hint: Focus on the algorithm's steps and its benefits in preventing deadlocks.

questions.question: Explain the role of a timeout in the deadlock detection using the Rolling Stone algorithm and provide an example of its application.
questions.hint: Focus on the algorithm's use of timeouts and a real-life scenario.

questions.question: Discuss the trade-off between process priority and thread suspension in resolving deadlocks using the Priority Ceiling Protocol (PCP).
questions.hint: Focus on the protocol's mechanism and its implications on system performance.
